data.title: Telegram Crackdown Halts $27B Haowang Guarantee – Dark Markets Persist
data.description:
Elliptic has traced more than $27 billion in illicit USDT through Haowang Guarantee, a Telegram-based laundering hub linked to Cambodia’s Huione Group and North Korea’s Lazarus hackers. Although Telegram has blocked related accounts, over 30 comparable underground marketplaces remain operational.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/telegram-crackdown-halts-27b-haowang-dark-markets-persist/

data.title: Coinbase says customer data breach will cost it $400 million
data.description:
Coinbase said on Thursday that it expects to lose between $180 million and $400 million after a cyberattack exposed customer information and triggered a nearly 3% drop in its stock. The statement came just four days after the company got an email from a threat actor on May 11, claiming access to internal documents and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/coinbase-data-breach-will-cost-400-million/

data.title: Crypto Bank Sygnum Expands Loan Collateral to Include Staked Solana
data.description:
TL;DR Sygnum now allows staked SOL to be used as collateral in Lombard loans, combining fiat liquidity access with staking rewards in a single operation. The move responds to growing institutional demand for Solana and its position as the second-largest staked token by market capitalization. The initiative lowers net borrowing costs through staking yields while. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/crypto-bank-sygnum-expands-loan-collateral-to-include-staked-solana/

data.title: ECB says restoring cash’s role requires a digital euro
data.description:
The European Central Bank (ECB) has underlined the necessity for a digital euro to preserve cash’s central role in the rising digital economy. As per a speech by ECB Executive Board Member Piero Cipollone at the France Payments Forum, he argued that with individuals entering into digital payments and online businesses increasing, the use of […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ecb-says-restoring-cash-requires-digital-eur/

data.title: Grok AI says Elon Musk ‘instructed’ it to discuss the white genocide in South Africa
data.description:
